parameters.name: search_exercises
parameters.description: Search the wger exercise database (845+ exercises). Filter by muscle group, equipment, category, language. Returns a list with exercise IDs you can pass to get_exercise. Parameters: muscles (muscle ID from list_muscles, optional), equipment (equipment ID from list_equipment, optional), category (category ID from list_categories, optional), name (free-text name to bias ranking, optional), language (de/en/es/fr/it, optional, default en), limit (1-50, optional, default 10)

value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', 'Free-text exercise name to rank-bias (e.g. "squat")', 'string') }}
value.language: ={{ $fromAI('language', 'Language code: de, en, es, fr, it (default en)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_exercise
parameters.description: Get the full details of one exercise by its wger ID — name, description (instructions), aliases, primary/secondary muscles, equipment, and image URLs. Parameters: exercise_id (integer ID from search_exercises, required), language (de/en/es/fr/it, optional, default en)

value.language: ={{ $fromAI('language', 'Language code: de, en, es, fr, it (default en)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_categories
parameters.description: List all wger exercise categories with their IDs (Arms, Legs, Cardio, Chest, Back, Shoulders, Abs). Use these IDs in search_exercises (parameter: category). No parameters.

parameters.name: list_muscles
parameters.description: List all muscle groups available for filtering with their IDs (e.g. Quadriceps femoris, Pectoralis major, Latissimus dorsi). Use these IDs in search_exercises (parameter: muscles). No parameters.

parameters.name: list_equipment
parameters.description: List all equipment types with their IDs (Barbell, Dumbbell, Bodyweight, Pull-up bar, etc.). Use these IDs in search_exercises (parameter: equipment). No parameters.

parameters.name: list_public_templates
parameters.description: List public workout routine templates available on wger (Stronglifts 5x5, Push-Pull-Legs, Starting Strength, etc.). Returns templates with IDs you can pass to get_template_detail. Parameter: limit (1-50, optional, default 20)

parameters.name: get_template_detail
parameters.description: Get the full structure of a public workout template — all sessions/days with exercises, sets, reps, and weight prescriptions. Returns both human-readable text and raw JSON in 'raw' for programmatic import. Parameter: template_id (integer ID from list_public_templates, required)
